---
title: "Diabetes Holter"
author: "Christine Lucille Kuryla"
date: "2025-03-28"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}

library(R.matlab)

a <- readMat("../../../../Downloads/19072938.mat")

library(RHRV)
glimpse(a)
head(t(a$RS)/1000)


# Create HRV data object
hrv_data <- CreateHRVData()

# Convert RR intervals to a format RHRV can work with
rr_intervals <- as.numeric(t(a$RS)/1000)  # Convert to seconds

# Use BuildNIHR to build the heart rate series from RR intervals
hrv_data$Beat$RR <- rr_intervals
hrv_data$Beat$Time <- cumsum(rr_intervals)
hrv_data$Beat$Time <- hrv_data$Beat$Time - hrv_data$Beat$Time[1]  # Start at time 0
hrv_data <- BuildNIHR(hrv_data)

# Now you can proceed with HRV analysis
# For example:
# hrv_data <- CreateTimeAnalysis(hrv_data)
# hrv_data <- CreateFreqAnalysis(hrv_data)

      hrv_data <- CreateHRVData()

      # Load beat times - using absolute timestamps
   #   hrv_data <- LoadBeatVector(hrv_data, t(a$RS))
      hrv_data <- LoadBeatRR(hrv_data, as.numeric(t(a$RS)/1000))
      
      # Build and filter NIHR
      hrv_data <- BuildNIHR(hrv_data)
      hrv_data <- FilterNIHR(hrv_data)
      
      # Interpolate NIHR
      hrv_data <- InterpolateNIHR(hrv_data, freqhr = 4)
      
      # Time analysis
      hrv_data <- CreateTimeAnalysis(hrv_data)
      
      # Calculate average heart rate (60 / average IBI in seconds)
      avg_hr <- 60 / mean(group_data$ibi, na.rm = TRUE)
      
      # Extract metrics
      # First check if the metric is empty, if not, then continue and extract metric
      sdnn <- ifelse(!is.null(hrv_data$TimeAnalysis) && length(hrv_data$TimeAnalysis) > 0, 
                     hrv_data$TimeAnalysis[[1]]$SDNN, NA)
      rmssd <- ifelse(!is.null(hrv_data$TimeAnalysis) && length(hrv_data$TimeAnalysis) > 0, 
                      hrv_data$TimeAnalysis[[1]]$rMSSD, NA)
      hrvi <- ifelse(!is.null(hrv_data$TimeAnalysis) && length(hrv_data$TimeAnalysis) > 0, 
                     hrv_data$TimeAnalysis[[1]]$HRVi, NA)
      

      
      
      
      
      
  # Create HRV data object
hrv_data <- CreateHRVData()

# Convert RR intervals and ensure proper structure
rr_intervals <- as.numeric(t(a$RS)/1000)  # Convert to seconds

# Manually build the Beat structure completely
hrv_data$Beat$RR <- rr_intervals
hrv_data$Beat$Time <- cumsum(c(0, rr_intervals[1:(length(rr_intervals)-1)]))  # Start at 0
hrv_data$Beat$Index <- 1:length(rr_intervals)

# Now build the NIHR data

hrv_data <- BuildNIHR(hrv_data)
hrv_data <- FilterNIHR(hrv_data)
hrv_data <- InterpolateNIHR(hrv_data)
  
hrv_data <- CreateTimeAnalysis(hrv_data)
hrv_data <- CreateFreqAnalysis(hrv_data)
hrv_data <- CreateNonLinearAnalysis(hrv_data)

hrv_data$TimeAnalysis
hrv_data$FreqAnalysis[[1]]
      
      
```
